notes:
v0.2.2 — install + update polish.

Small release focused on smoothing two friction points existing users have hit.

• New: DMG installer. The /download flow is now the standard Mac drag-onto-Applications experience instead of a .tar.gz that extracts first. Cleaner for new installs. (Auto-updates from v0.2.1 keep using the .tar.gz path — nothing changes for you here.)
• Update errors now speak English. If the auto-updater hits the classic "Read-only file system" trap (running from Downloads instead of Applications), the message in Settings → Check for Updates now reads "Move Voquence to /Applications/ to enable updates" instead of "Couldn't check: Error: ... (os error 30)". Network errors get a similarly clear line.
• Local Whisper continues running on CPU (~0.58s per dictation). Metal GPU is queued for v0.2.3 — current Apple Metal SDK rejects some of whisper.cpp's shader code, and the fix isn't a single-line bump. CPU is already faster than the OpenAI API round trip, so it's an optimization, not a blocker.
